summary: A vertical recorded clip, posted by the account, filmed on an exterior White House colonnade. A woman in a red shirt and dark leggings hands paper takeout bags to a man with white-gray hair in a dark suit standing in a doorway; in later frames he holds the bags and the two appear to converse. The framing is a single handheld shot. No burned-in captions appear in the sampled frames.

script.scene: A woman in a red shirt hands a paper takeout bag to a man in a dark suit standing in a glass-paned doorway on a colonnade.
The man holds two paper takeout bags as the two stand facing each other.
The man holds the bags and gestures while the woman stands with hands clasped.
